song.title: Filled
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Blessed, mighty Holy Ghost, Fill me to the uttermost; Let my life Thy channel be, Just a channel, Lord, for Thee; Through me all Thy fullness pour, Give me ever more and more.
[V2] 2) Blessed, mighty Holy Ghost, Fill me to the uttermost; Be it unto me, O Lord, Now, according to Thy Word, Let the life of Jesus be, Ever filling, even me.
[V3] 3) Blessed, mighty Holy Ghost, Fill me to the uttermost; Cleansed and holy, pure and clean, Let the life of Christ be seen, Hold o’er me Thy gracious sway, Every hour of every day.
[V4] 4) Blessed, mighty Holy Ghost, Fill me to the uttermost; For Thy love, Thy light, Thy pow’r, Just a channel hour by hour, Till my Savior’s face I see, Fill me Lord, fill even me.
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
